hooks.command: bash -c 'R="$HOME/.claude/claude-config"; if [ -d "$R/.git" ]; then timeout 10 git -C "$R" pull --ff-only -q 2>/dev/null || true; else timeout 30 git clone --depth 1 -q https://github.com/mvroeder/claude-config.git "$R" 2>/dev/null || exit 0; fi; [ -x "$R/scripts/sync-skills.sh" ] && exec "$R/scripts/sync-skills.sh" || true'
